channel.title: Kubernetes on Aleksei Riumin | Senior Infrastructure Architect
channel.description: Recent content in Kubernetes on Aleksei Riumin | Senior Infrastructure Architect

item.title: Cost-Effective Kubernetes: Hardware Isolating Dev & Prod Environments in a Single Cluster
item.description: Learn how to use Kubernetes Node Affinity to safely run Development and Production environments within a single cluster, saving B2B infrastructure costs.
